headline: Agent deployment dominated the week as Cursor shipped an iOS app and Spotify ran Claude agents across 20M-plus lines of code.
body: Production agent work led the window: Cursor released an iOS app driving always-on cloud agents from mobile, and Spotify described employees using Claude agents to generate working prototypes within hours across a 20-million-line codebase. Google Cloud demonstrated a production multi-agent system built on its Agent Development Kit, the Model Context Protocol, and Gemini 3 Flash, while separate talks covered building effective agent skills and combining Hermes Agent with a Mixture of Agents approach. On the infrastructure side a cluster of techniques broke out together, including semantic chunking, HNSW, tenant isolation, guardrails, prompt-injection defense, vulnerability detection, and kernel fusion. Frontier-model business dynamics also surfaced, with discussion of OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, Anthropic's Mythos, billing transparency, and cost pressures on labs.

cited_items.title: Hermes Agent + Mixture of Agents is insane…
